name: Social Media Content
summary: Quarterly social media content programme across LinkedIn and X to build the PMO brand and share project insights. The content calendar is running; scope is expanding faster than the current freelance capacity can sustain.
progress: Q3 content calendar agreed and scheduled.
Brand templates and tone-of-voice guide signed off.
First four posts published; engagement tracking in place.
upcoming: Produce the case-study series for delivered projects.
Set up monthly analytics review against engagement targets.

risks.risk: Scope creep from ad-hoc post requests.
risks.impact: Dilutes the planned calendar and stretches capacity.
risks.mitigation: Intake form and a fortnightly prioritisation review.

risks.impact: Production stalls if they are unavailable.
risks.mitigation: Onboard a backup designer from the approved supplier list.
